# MHChub

MHChub is an internal company utility portal for MANI operations.

## Purpose

- Open IoT Mani PY1 and PY2 dashboards.
- Open PLC Gateway Pro.
- Open the work log system.
- Manage Occupational Safety, hygiene, and 6S information by department.
- Share internal Safety - 6S documents.

## Important Pages

- Home: http://172.25.20.208:3333/
- Safety - 6S command center: http://172.25.20.208:3333/safety-6s
- Documents: http://172.25.20.208:3333/documents

## Access Notes

Public internal users can view links, Safety - 6S summaries, and shared documents.
Admin, EHS, and leader accounts can update configuration, upload documents, and create runtime backups.
